description_long: This object consists of a rectangular, gold and white cigarette box labeled 'Parisienne MILD' with a metallic sheen and several individual cigarettes lying beside it. The box features prominent branding and multilingual health warnings, with a barcode and additional text on the sides. The cigarettes are cylindrical, with white paper wrapping and tan filters at one end, and are depicted both inside and outside the box. The box appears to be made of thin cardboard with a glossy finish, while the cigarettes themselves are composed of paper, tobacco, and a filter. The overall appearance is clean, with no visible burn marks or ash, indicating unused cigarettes. The packaging and cigarettes are typical of those found in urban environments, such as streets or parks.
description: A gold and white 'Parisienne MILD' cigarette box with several unused cigarettes featuring tan filters, displayed both inside and outside the box. The box has clear branding, health warnings, and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: A side view showing the gold cigarette box with a white label and barcode, alongside four unused cigarettes with tan filters.
description_view_1: The front of the box is visible, displaying the 'Parisienne MILD' branding and a single cigarette protruding from the side.
description_view_2: A rear angled view showing the side branding, health warnings, and four cigarettes lying in front of the box.
description_view_3: A direct view of the box's back, featuring multilingual health warnings and four cigarettes with tan filters spread out in front.
attribute_brand_logo: The box displays the 'Parisienne MILD' brand name prominently on the front and sides, with additional text and a crest above the logo.
